name: Xinghuo (iFLYTEK Spark)
description: iFLYTEKs Spark (讯飞星火) LLM developer API and speech/ASR/TTS APIs via xfyun.cn open platform.

seo.title: Xinghuo (iFLYTEK Spark) — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Xinghuo (iFLYTEK Spark): iFLYTEKs Spark (讯飞星火) LLM developer API and speech/ASR/TTS APIs via xfyun.cn open platform.

when_to_use: Building Chinese LLM applications on Spark's multimodal API
Running Spark-powered agents for enterprise productivity tools
Accessing iFLYTEK's frontier model for document and code tasks
Developing Chinese-language AI apps competitive with GPT-4

pros: Spark LLM competitive on Chinese benchmarks
Paired with strong speech APIs in one platform
Fast improvement cycle with new versions
cons: Model weights not open, vendor lock-in
review.verdict: A credible domestic LLM stack for China-facing products that also need speech.
review.best_for: Chinese market apps needing combined LLM plus ASR/TTS from one vendor
review.not_for: Multilingual or non-China products wanting open-weight flexibility
